hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use look("down") to check the emoji on the current square

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use hasKey() to check if an emoji is already in your dictionary

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use removeEmoji() after collecting an emoji from a square

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Call announceEmojis() with your dictionary after reaching the finish
